title: oxalis magellanica
intro: Oxalis magellanica, also known as the Magellanic wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxalis magellanica include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Oxalis magellanica can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
